vocab.meaning: tuổi thơ bình yên, đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: I was blessed with an idyllic childhood where my afternoons were mostly spent wandering through the local meadows.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động gắn liền với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Before the digital age took over, nature-bound activities like hiking and bird watching were my primary sources of entertainment.

vocab.meaning: việc khám phá mà không có người lớn đi kèm
vocab.example: Back then, the neighborhood was safe enough for us to engage in unaccompanied exploration until the streetlights came on.

vocab.meaning: một người/vật quen thuộc trong khu phố
vocab.example: Taking a stroll became such a habit that I practically became a neighborhood fixture, known by all the local shopkeepers.

vocab.meaning: hòa mình/giao hòa với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged me to go outside and commune with nature to clear my head after school.

vocab.meaning: trốn học/đi chơi khi đáng lẽ phải ở đâu đó
vocab.example: Occasionally, my friends and I would play truant from our extra classes just to explore the nearby forest.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi lại những kỷ niệm
vocab.example: Walking down those same old paths today never fails to rekindle memories of my carefree youth.

vocab.meaning: mảng xanh đô thị (công viên, cây cối trong thành phố)
vocab.example: I was lucky to live near a massive park, providing ample urban greenery for my daily walks.

vocab.meaning: những con đường mòn có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: We used to spend every weekend trekking along the scenic trails that bordered our small town.

vocab.meaning: người cực kỳ yêu thích các hoạt động ngoài trời
vocab.example: Even as a toddler, I was quite an outdoor enthusiast, always crying if I wasn't taken out for a walk.
